benchmarks.name: Standard Blink
benchmarks.description: Simple LED + Resistor on a digital pin. Verifies basic synthesis.

benchmarks.name: I2C Temperature Bridge
benchmarks.description: DHT22 or BMP280 over I2C. Verifies bus wiring and pin-mapping logic.

benchmarks.name: Analog Control Loop
benchmarks.description: Potentiometer controlling a Servo. Verifies analog input and PWM output.
